rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal; the unresolved Iran deal keeps EU energy price uncertainty in the background, but no new qualitative shift occurred.

top_events.title: Iran claims deal with US near, Israel strikes Lebanon
top_events.summary: A concluded US-Iran deal could ease EU energy prices benefiting Portuguese households and businesses, but the deal remains unfinished and uncertainty persists.

top_events.title: Warner Bros $111bn sale to Paramount approved
top_events.summary: Large US media merger with no meaningful impact on daily life in Portugal.

top_events.title: Discovery of €1.2m jewellery prompts fresh probe into former Spanish PM
top_events.summary: Iberian political scandal in neighboring Spain; minor background noise for Portugal with no direct policy or economic impact.
